    New PPD files for the following models have been added:

            * ET-2800 series
            * ET-2810 series
            * ET-2820 series
            * ET-2850 series
            * L3250 series
            * L3260 series
            * L4260 series
            * L5290 series
            * ST-C2100 series
            * WF-2820 series
            * WF-2840 series
            * WF-2870 series
            * XP-2150 series
            * XP-3150 series
            * XP-4150 series

    PR:             258074
